name: guanyu-zhang--tripgo-api
description: Comprehensive interface for the TripGo API, covering routing, public transport, trips, and location services. Use for multimodal journey planning, public transport data, and geocoding. Works well with location-discovery skills (e.g., goplaces) to resolve POIs and pass coordinates to compute and compare route options and costs (e.g., taxi fares) across transport modes.
